pi_items.verified_value: Hoechst 33342 (channel1 files, part of 3-channel stain: Hoechst/pH3/Phalloidin)

pi_items.source: Stated as based on CoolSNAP HQ (6.45 µm pixel) + Nikon 40x + 2x2 binning, but this microscope setup does not match BBBC008 acquisition system
Task description specifies 'exclude objects smaller than 50 square pixels'
Task description specifies 'exclude objects larger than 5000 square pixels'

privileged_info_summary: BBBC008 is a real public dataset from the Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection containing Human HT29 colon-cancer cells (not Drosophila Kc167 as claimed). The dataset includes 12 images acquired on a Cellomics/microscopy system, stained with Hoechst (DNA, channel 1), pH3 (channel 2), and Phalloidin (channel 3). The files use 'channel1', 'channel3' naming (not 'w1', 'w2'). The images are 512×512 pixel 8-bit grayscale TIFFs. The pixel scale value of 0.3296 µm/pixel cannot be verified as matching the actual BBBC008 acquisition system specifications. The QC requirements (min 50 px², max 5000 px²) and output file paths are consistent with the task description.
